note: Employer HR confirming return-to-work date / top-up. Employment correspondence.

input.rawContent:
From: hr@northwind-systems.com
Subject: Your parental leave top-up and return date

Hi Sam, confirming your parental leave runs through Sept 8, 2026, with the company top-up to 85% of salary for the first 12 weeks. Please confirm your planned return-to-work date by August 1 so we can plan coverage. — People Ops
